arts.ttl: Inside the chaos of Rangers fan riots 17 years ago during their UEFA Cup final defeat - with disorder labelled the 'the worst night of violence in Manchester since the Blitz'
arts.sum: Police clashed with fans and made 42 arrests on what a judge later described as 'the worst night of violence and destruction suffered by Manchester city centre since the Blitz'.

arts.ttl: Rangers boss Philippe Clement dismisses Ruben Amorim noise ahead of Man United Europa League clash
arts.sum: Rangers face Manchester United in the Europa League as both sides look to take one step closer to a place in the last 16

arts.ttl: I won't be deluded about Man Utd problems - Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim steps back from his description of his team as possibly the worst in Manchester United history but says they have major problems.

arts.ttl: We are maybe worst team in Man Utd history - Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim calls his side "maybe the worst in Manchester United history," but refuses to change his ideals despite recent struggles.

arts.ttl: Why are Man Utd struggling in Amorim's system?
arts.sum: Match Of The Day 2 pundits Leon Osman and Fara Williams discuss Manchester United's tactical struggles under new coach Ruben Amorim, as well as his stern criticism of his side after a 3-1 loss to Brighton.

arts.ttl: Pressure at Man Utd is the highest - De Ligt
arts.sum: Dion Dublin speaks with Matthijs de Ligt to discuss pressure at Manchester United and finding solutions to bad results.

arts.ttl: Who will win Man Utd vs Rangers? Our writers deliver their predictions for the Europa League blockbuster
arts.sum: It's a mouthwatering cross-border clash at the Theatre of Dreams and our experts have their say

arts.ttl: Rangers ‘don’t have the money’ to pay for transfer – Future is in player’s hands
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the German media that it’s looking unlikely Vaclav Cerny will remain with Rangers beyond this season. The 27-year-old is currently on loan with the Ibrox club from VfL Wolfsburg and has been a regular under Philippe Clement since his arrival in the summer. arts.ttl: Rangers star’s verdict on Amad after loan spell and extra motivation to beat Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Amad will see some familiar faces upon his return to Ibrox when the Red Devils collide with Rangers in their next Europa League game on Thursday

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Napoli 'drop major Alejandro Garnacho hint' as 'contact is made' over deal for 23-year-old
arts.sum: Napoli, who continue to be linked with Manchester United's Alejandro Garnacho, allegedly make contact with Borussia Dortmund to discuss a deal for Karim Adeyemi.
